reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicios xo.oleta.
Baños limpios, un shop con varias opciones.
Reciben pagos con la app YPF

(Translated by Google)
XO.Oleta gas station.
Clean restrooms, a shop with various options.
They accept payments with the YPF app.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScS1TQ3ZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pequeño para la afluencia de vehículos. Los empleados con muy buena onda, pero pocos

(Translated by Google)
Small for the volume of traffic. The employees are very friendly, but there aren't enough of them.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSazRtOTZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te atienden muy bien, pero es frecuente que haya una fila extensa para cargar combustible. Ojo que casi no hay señal de celular para poder pagar con la app QR y las redes de wifi casi ni les funcionan, tenés que terminar pagando en efectivo o tarjeta y perdés los descuentos

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, but there's often a long line to fill up. Be aware that there's almost no cell phone signal to pay with the QR code app, and the Wi-Fi networks barely work; you'll end up having to pay in cash or by card and you'll lose the discounts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbzhLWldREAE
